description:
src/lib.rs uses the literal "aws-ssm" 9 times: in the URI backend check (line 162-164), in error mapping (lines 73, 80, 91, 97, 114, 121, 132, 143, 149), and in run_on_new_thread (line 55).

A single `const BACKEND: &str = "aws-ssm";` at the top of the module would (a) reduce the chance of a typo when copy-pasting (already happened in sibling crates — see audit history), (b) make grepping easier when refactoring, and (c) match the style other crates in the workspace use.

Bikeshedding-adjacent — file at P4. If declined, close as won't-fix.
title: secretx-aws-ssm: backend literal "aws-ssm" repeated 9 times — extract const BACKEND
